title: McCormick stock falls 6% after spice maker calls for lower sales, pinning it on inflation
text: Shares of McCormick & Co. Inc. MKC, +3.41% fell 6% in the extended session Wednesday after the spice maker and distributor said that third-quarter sales have fallen short of its expectations. Sales are expected to rise by about 3% in the quarter, McCormick said, and per-share adjusted earnings are seen at around 65 cents, compared with 80 cents a share in the year-ago period.
